scenarios.capability: Produce a project.json with @nx-bun/nx build, serve, and test executor targets configured correctly
scenarios.reason: Requires producing a static JSON file with the correct executor references, options, and cache declarations.

scenarios.capability: Configure nx.json targetDefaults for Bun build and test targets with correct cache inputs and outputs
scenarios.reason: Requires producing or updating nx.json with named input references and output declarations.

scenarios.capability: Migrate a project.json from Jest to the Bun test runner by replacing the test target without leaving dual ownership
scenarios.reason: Requires producing an updated project.json that removes Jest executor and adds @nx-bun/nx:test with appropriate options.

scenarios.capability: Identify and document lockfile cleanup steps required when migrating from npm to Bun in an Nx workspace
scenarios.reason: Requires producing a written migration plan or checklist file describing the lockfile removal steps.
